step_2_image_prompt: Take the persona reference photo as the locked source for her face, hair color and damp slicked-back low loose bun, body proportions, ivory waffle-knit robe and white camisole outfit, and the entire bedroom corner scene including the wooden chair with cashmere throw, ceramic plant, and warm wood floor — all of these must remain faithful to the reference. She is now holding the Alluvi product in her right hand at chest level: her right arm bent at the elbow and raised from her side, wrist relaxed, fingers naturally curved around the box with thumb pressed on the front face and four fingers wrapping the back edge, the box rotated so the long side is vertical and the front face points directly toward the camera. The product is approximately 7 inches tall in this vertical orientation, sized realistically relative to her hand. Her body posture and arm angle may shift slightly to make the holding pose look natural and not stamped on. Both hands must remain visible in the frame — her right hand visibly grips the product, her left hand rests at her left hip gently touching the robe sash. Do not hide either hand in pockets, behind her back, or crop them out of the frame. The Alluvi product packaging must match the product reference photo exactly — every text element, color, graphic, and certification badge as shown. Preserve the packaging's natural white base color, only apply the scene's directional lighting on top. Match the lighting direction of the persona scene: soft cool morning daylight from the large window on the left, balanced diffuse wash across her face and the robe, gentle cool-neutral tone on the box surface, with a soft shadow falling toward the right.
